MRpms 0.95.1.000

Plot method for MRpms_conf class with dimension 1.

Source: R/MRpms_conf.R
plot.MRpms_conf.Rd

Plot method for MRpms_conf objects, which are computed from a ConfPMS call and contains information to construct confidence intervals for the computed modes.

Usage

# S3 method for class 'MRpms_conf'
plot(x, data, ...)

Arguments

x

An MRpms_conf object.

data

The data from which the modes were computed.

...

Other parameters

Value

A plot with the data, in blank circles, the modes in red, the pointwise confidence intervals in blue and the uniform confidence intervals in gray.

See also

ConfPMS()

On this page
